# Radio Agent

> Ambient audio awareness for AI coding sessions. A continuously playing radio station that announces what your AI agents are doing via voice over an Icecast stream.

Radio Agent mixes three audio channels into one stream: ambient music (peripheral), voice announcements via Kokoro TTS (center-pull, triggered by webhook), and short ambient tones (peripheral sound effects for frequent events). External systems POST JSON to a webhook endpoint, the brain translates events to natural language, renders speech, and injects it into the stream with automatic music ducking.

## Install

```
curl -sSL https://radioagent.live/install.sh | bash
```

Or with Docker:

```
git clone https://github.com/nmelo/radioagent.git
cd radioagent
docker compose up -d
```

Dashboard at http://localhost:8001. Stream at http://localhost:8000/stream.

## Key Features

- Continuous ambient music playback via Liquidsoap + Icecast
- Voice announcements from Kokoro TTS (82M params, 50ms per clip on GPU, CPU-capable)
- Webhook API: POST /announce with JSON (required field: detail)
- Template-based script generator (event kind maps to natural language)
- Rate limiting (1 announcement per 10 seconds, queue max 10)
- Web dashboard with now-playing, wire feed with typing animation, player controls
- Server-side music mute/unmute, announcement mute, independent channel toggles
- Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff
- DJ skill for Claude Code agents (creative radio-style announcements)
- Ambient tones channel (short sound effects for frequent events, no ducking)

## Stack

- Python 3.12+, FastAPI, uvicorn
- Kokoro 82M TTS (GPU or CPU)
- Liquidsoap 2.x (audio mixing, ducking, crossfade, MP3 encoding)
- Icecast 2 (HTTP MP3 streaming)
- Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS dashboard (no build tools)
- Docker Compose for cross-platform deployment

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/nmelo/radioagent
- Website: https://radioagent.live
- DJ Skill: https://radioagent.live/dj.skill

- Operations Guide: https://github.com/nmelo/radioagent/blob/main/docs/operations.md

## Webhook API

POST http://host:8001/announce

```json
{
  "detail": "Finished the auth refactor",
  "kind": "agent.completed",
  "agent": "eng1",
  "project": "myproject"
}
```

Required: detail. All other fields optional. Returns {"status": "queued"} on success.

## Philosophy

Radio Agent is a calm technology. Music sits in the periphery. Announcements briefly pull information to the center of attention, then return to the periphery. Inspired by Weiser and Brown's "The Coming Age of Calm Technology" (1996) and the dangling string concept: ambient awareness without demanding attention.
